questions.question: What is the activation function used in the ReLU layer of AlexNet?
questions.explanation: ReLU (Rectified Linear Unit) is the activation function used in the ReLU layer of AlexNet.

questions.question: How many convolutional layers are in AlexNet?
What is the maximum pool size in AlexNet?
questions.explanation: The maximum pool size in AlexNet is 2x2.

questions.question: How many fully connected layers are in AlexNet?
What is the final activation function used in the output layer of AlexNet?
questions.explanation: Softmax is the final activation function used in the output layer of AlexNet.
